raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2024, I purchased one ticket through XXXX for {$690.00} to attend the XXXX XXXX XXXX game between the XXXX XXXX XXXX and XXXX  XXXX at XXXX XXXX XXXX. The game was scheduled to start at XXXX XXXX. 
I arrived at XXXX XXXX XXXX on time for the XXXX XXXX  start. However, due to a security issue at the venue, I was not permitted to enter the arena until XXXX XXXX  - nearly 2 hours after the game had begun. I remained on-site the entire time waiting to be admitted. 
By the time I was finally allowed to enter at XXXX XXXX, I was only able to watch the final 10 minutes of the game. I immediately complained to both XXXX and XXXX XXXX XXXX staff about missing virtually the entire XXXX XXXX XXXX  game I had paid {$690.00} to see. 
Despite paying full price for a premium ticket to experience a complete XXXX  game, I received essentially no value from my purchase due to the venue 's security issue - circumstances completely beyond my control. 
I have disputed this charge twice with American Express, but both disputes were denied with Amex stating the ticket was " not refundable. '' However, this is not a refund request for buyer 's remorse- this is a complaint about complete failure to deliver the goods and services I paid for.
